<!--
==Sword Moon==
{| class="wikitable"
!Pedestal
!colspan="2"|Task
!Rewards
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|Front-Left
|Dig-Mine
|Dig out all 7 Mines on tiles: 7; 17; 25; 49; 55; 70; 78
|{{{RewardIconWithText|Sword Moon}} +3
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|Front-Right
|Clear Domain
|Clear Samoyed Dojo; Yamato Dojo; Mikawa Dojo; Kaga Dojo; Kai Dojo; Echigo Dojo; Mutsu Dojo; Bladden Dojo
|{{RewardIconWithText|Sword Moon}} +3
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Back-Left
|Eliminate Generals
|Eliminate Sword Kiku; Sword Dojigiri; Sword Mikazuki; Sword Nagamitsu; Sword Onimaru; Sword Jyuzumaru; Musket Cagutsuchi
|{{RewardIconWithText|Sword Moon}} +3
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Back-Right
|Explore Domain
|Investigate the tiles within the Samoyed Dojo; Yamato Dojo; Mikawa Dojo; Kaga Dojo; Kai Dojo; Echigo Dojo; Mutsu Dojo; Bladden Dojo
|{{RewardIconWithText|Sword Moon}} +3
|-
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Back-Middle
|Yamato Bladden
|Defeat Real Bladden and Bladden's Head
|{{RewardIconWithText|Sword Moon}} +5
|}

===Moon Shop===
{|class="wikitable"
!Item
!Cost
!Quantity Available
|-
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Sheath}}<span style="color:var(--blue-text)">T3 Minerva Power</span> +50
|1||1
|-
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Scrolls}}<span style="color:var(--blue-text)">T3 Minerva Wings</span> +50
|1||1
|-
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Core}}<span style="color:var(--blue-text)">T3 Minerva Core</span> +50
|1||1
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Toner, +120}}
|2||1
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +150k}}
|3||1
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Refine Speedup, +2d}}
|4||1
|-
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Golden Pickaxe, +8|orange}}
|5||1
|-
|{{RewardIcon|Crystal of Will}}{{Gearlink|orange|Material|Crystal of Will}}
|6||1
|}

==Mom's Shop (Tile 32)==
{| class="wikitable"
!Product
!Cost
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Sword Moon}} +1
|50k {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}}
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Toner, +120}}
|72k {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}}
|-
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Yamato Treasure Map, +100}}
|55k {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}}
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Glue, +30}}
|30k {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}}
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Clone Speedup, +3h}}
|20k {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}}
|-
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Wish Coin, +1|orange}}
|25k {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}}
|}

==Legend==
{|class=wikitable
!Type
!Color Assignment
|-
|Event
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|
|-
|Snail Battle
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|
|-
|Minion Battle
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|
|-
|Reward
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|
|-
|Mine Pit
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|
|-
|Store
|style="background-color:var(--orange-bg)"|
|}

==Tiles==
{| class="wikitable"
!Tile
!Name
!Notes
!Rewards
|-
|rowspan="2"|1
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Ronin
|RUSH weakness: 1.500.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Sheath}}T1 Bladden Sheath +5
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Sign
|Chop the sign!
|{{RewardIconWithText|Wood, +500}}
|-
|2
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Ronin
|RUSH weakness: 1.510.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Scrolls}}T1 Bladden Scrolls +5
|-
|rowspan="2"|3
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Ronin
|RUSH weakness: 1.510.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Core}} T1 Bladden Core +5
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|Daruma Tumbler
|Enter the {{RewardIconWithText|Password Note}} (4423)
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Lottery Ticket, +3|orange}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Engineering Printing Supply, +50}}
|-
|4
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Ronin
|RUSH weakness: 1.500.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Sheath}}T1 Bladden Sheath +5
|-
|5
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Ronin
|RUSH weakness: 1.520.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Scrolls}}T1 Bladden Scrolls +5
|-
|rowspan="2"|6
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Ronin
|RUSH weakness: 1.520.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Core}} T1 Bladden Core +5
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|Kshitigarbha Statue
|Offer food! (100 {{RewardIconWithLink|Oden}})
|{{RewardIconWithText|Offering Speedup, +12h}}
|-
|rowspan="2"|7
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Miner
|RUSH weakness: 1.530.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Core}}T1 Bladden Core +5
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|Mine Pit
|Mining duration: 7h 37min 8sec; requirement: 30x T2+ minions
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Yamato Treasure Map, +480}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Ancient Coin, +240}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Sword Box, +2}}
|-
|8
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Ronin
|RUSH weakness: 1.530.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Sheath}} T1 Bladden Sheath +5
|-

|rowspan="2"|9
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Ronin
|RUSH weakness: 1.540.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Scrolls}} T1 Bladden Scrolls +5
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|Hermit Seijuro's Tomb
|ATK: 21.571, DEF: 14.126, HP: 315.930, AFFCT: 41.000; <br>Special stats: HIT: +50, Paralysis RES +50%
|{{RewardIconWithText|Sword Moon}} +1
|-
|rowspan="2"|10
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Sword Kiku
|RUSH weakness: 1.540.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|T1 Bladden Core}} T1 Bladden Core +5
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Broken Sword
|Collect the sword shards!
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Gear Chest, +100}}
|-
|rowspan="2"|11
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Samurai
|RUSH weakness: 1.550.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Steath}} T1 Bladden Steath +5
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Sign
|Chop the sign!
|{{RewardIconWithText|Wood, +500}}
|-
|rowspan="2"|12
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)|Samurai
|RUSH weakness: 1.560.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Scrolls}}T1 Bladden Scrolls +5
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)|Sealed Stone
|Display Relic: FAME>81
|{{RewardIconWithText|Zombie Cell, +3k}}
|-
|13
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Samurai
|RUSH weakness: 1.550.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Core}} T1 Bladden Core +5
|-
|14
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Samurai
|RUSH weakness: 1.580.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Steath}} T1 Bladden Steath +5
|-
|rowspan="2"|15
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Samurai
|RUSH weakness: 1.580.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Scrolls}} T1 Bladden Scrolls +5
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|Sealed Stone
|Display Relic: FTH>85
|{{RewardIconWithText|Demon Cell, +3k}}
|-
|16
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Samurai
|RUSH weakness: 1.560.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Core}} T1 Bladden Core +5
|-
|rowspan="2"|17
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Miner
|RUSH weakness: 1.590.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Core}} T1 Bladden Core +5
|-
| style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|Mine Pit
|Mining duration: 7h 37min 8sec; requirement: 30x T2+ minions
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Tool Chest, +480}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Yamato Treasure Map, +480}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Sword Box, +2}}
|-
|rowspan="2"|18
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Samurai
|RUSH weakness: 1.570.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Steath}} T1 Bladden Steath +5
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|Sealed Stone
|Display Relic:ART>90
|{{RewardIconWithText|Angel Cell, +3k}}
|-
|rowspan="1"|19
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Samurai
|RUSH weakness: 1.570.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Scrolls}} T1 Bladden Scrolls +5
|-
|rowspan="2"|20
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Sword Dojigiri
|RUSH weakness: 1.600.000
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Core}} T1 Bladden Core +5
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|Duel
|ATK: 24.175, DEF: 15.831, HP: 381.177, AFFCT: 43.357<br>Special stats: HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Demon Chest, +50}}<br>{{RewardIcon|Domain Moon}}Sword Moon<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Lycoris|green}}
|-
|21
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Samurai
|RUSH weakness: 1.590.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Steath}} T1 Bladden Steath +5
|-
|rowspan="2"|22
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Samurai
|RUSH weakness: 1.600.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Scrolls}} T1 Bladden Scrolls +5
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|Sealed Stone
|Display Relic:CIV>88
|{{RewardIconWithText|Mutant Cell, +3k}}
|-
|rowspan="2"|23
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Samurai
|RUSH weakness: 1.610.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Core}} T1 Bladden Core +5
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Sign
|Chop the sign!
|{{RewardIconWithText|Ancient Wood, +3}}
|-
|24
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Swordsman
|RUSH weakness: 1.610.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Steath}} {{Retext|T2 Bladden Steath, +8|green}}
|-
|rowspan="2"|25
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Miner
|RUSH weakness: 1.620.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Core}} {{Retext|T2 Bladden Core, +8|green}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|Mine Pit
|Mining duration: 9h 31min 24sec; requirement: 30x T2+ minions
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Yamato Treasure Map, +480}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Lottery Ticket, +10|orange}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Sword Box, +2}}
|-
|26
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Swordsman
|RUSH weakness: 1.640.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Scrolls}} {{Retext|T2 Bladden Scrolls, +8|green}}
|-
|27
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Swordsman
|RUSH weakness: 1.620.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Core}} {{Retext|T2 Bladden Core, +8|green}}
|-
|28
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Swordsman
|RUSH weakness: 1.630.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Steath}} {{Retext|T2 Bladden Steath, +8|green}}
|-
|29
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Swordsman
|RUSH weakness: 1.630.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Scrolls}} {{Retext|T2 Bladden Scrolls, +8|green}}
|-
|rowspan="2"|30
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Swordsman
|RUSH weakness: 1.640.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Core}} {{Retext|T2 Bladden Core, +8|green}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|Snowfield Onsen
|Blend into the monkeys! (Need: GM Avatar)
|{{RewardIconWithText|Sword Moon}} +1
|-
|31
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Swordsman
|RUSH weakness: 1.650.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Steath}} {{Retext|T2 Bladden Steath, +8|green}}
|-
|rowspan="2"|32
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Mom
|RUSH weakness: 1.650.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Scrolls}} {{Retext|T2 Bladden Scrolls, +8|green}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--orange-bg)"|Mom's shop
|Opens Mom's shop
|
|-
|33
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Swordsman
|RUSH weakness: 1.660.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Core}} {{Retext|T2 Bladden Core, +8|green}}
|-
|34
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Sword Mikazuki
|RUSH weakness: 1.660.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Steath}} {{Retext|T2 Bladden Steath, +8|green}}
|-
|35
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Swordsman
|RUSH weakness: 1.670.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Scrolls}} {{Retext|T2 Bladden Scrolls, +8|green}}
|-
|36
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Swordsman
|RUSH weakness: 1.670.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Core}} {{Retext|T2 Bladden Core, +8|green}}
|-
|37
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Swordsman
|RUSH weakness: 1.680.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Steath}} {{Retext|T2 Bladden Steath, +8|green}}
|-
|rowspan="2"|38
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Sword Nagamitsu
|RUSH weakness: 1.700.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Core}} {{Retext|T2 Bladden Core, +8|green}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|Duel
|ATK: 27.061, DEF: 17.721, HP: 439.157, AFFCT: 46286<br>Special stats: HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
|{{RewardIconWithText|Sword Moon}} +1
|-
|39
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Ronin
|RUSH weakness: 1.700.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Steath}} {{Retext|T2 Bladden Steath, +8|green}}
|-
|rowspan="2"|40
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Swordsman
|RUSH weakness: 1.690.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Scrolls}} {{Retext|T2 Bladden Scrolls, +8|green}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Bamboo Forest
|Cut the bamboos! (requires 2.8M Power)
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Shinkage Ryu: Shift|green}}
|-
|41
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Ronin
|RUSH weakness: 1.690.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Core}} {{Retext|T2 Bladden Core, +8|green}}
|-
|42
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Ronin
|RUSH weakness:1.710.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Steath}} {{Retext|T2 Bladden Steath, +8|green}}
|-
|43
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Ronin
|RUSH weakness: 1.680.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Scrolls}} {{Retext|T2 Bladden Scrolls, +8|green}}
|-
|44
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Samurai
|RUSH weakness: 1.710.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Scrolls}} {{Retext|T2 Bladden Scrolls, +8|green}}
|-
|rowspan="2"|45
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Samurai
|RUSH weakness: 1.730.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Core}} {{Retext|T2 Bladden Core, +8|green}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Information on the Screen
|Record the numbers!
|{{RewardIconWithText|Password Note}} (4423)<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Lottery Ticket, +3|orange}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|B-tad, +4423}}
|-
|46
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Samurai
|RUSH weakness: 1.730.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Steath}} {{Retext|T2 Bladden Steath, +8|green}}
|-
|rowspan="2"|47
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Samurai
|RUSH weakness: 1.720.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Scrolls}} {{Retext|T2 Bladden Scrolls, +9|green}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Nogaku Hall
|Display 5-Star relic: {{RewardIconWithLink|Pine Trees Screen|purple}}
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Demon Chest, +50}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Sword Moon}} +1
|-
|48
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Samurai
|RUSH weakness: 1.720.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Core}} {{Retext|T2 Bladden Core, +8|green}}
|-
|rowspan="2"|49
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Miner
|RUSH weakness: 1.740.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Steath}} {{Retext|T2 Bladden Steath, +8|green}}
|-
|style="background-color:var[--green-bg)"|Mine Pit
|Mining duration: 9h 31min 24sec; requirement: 30x T2+ minions
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Evolution Chest, +600}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Yamato Treasure Map, +600}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Sword Box, +3}}
|-
|50
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Sword Onimaru
|RUSH weakness: 1.770.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Steath}} {{Retext|T2 Bladden Steath, +8|green}}
|-
|51
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Samurai
|RUSH weakness: 1.760.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Scrolls}} {{Retext|T2 Bladden Scrolls, +9|green}}
|-
|52
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Samurai
|RUSH weakness: 1.750.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Core}} {{Retext|T2 Bladden Core, +9|green}}
|-
|53
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Samurai
|RUSH weakness: 1.750.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Steath}} {{Retext|T2 Bladden Steath, +8|green}}
|-
|54
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Samurai
|RUSH weakness: 1.740.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Scrolls}} {{Retext|T2 Bladden Scrolls, +9|green}}
|-
|rowspan="2"|55
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Miner
|RUSH weakness: 1.890.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Scrolls}} {{Retext|T2 Bladden Scrolls, +8|green}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|Mine Pit
|Mining duration: 11h 25min 42sec; requirement: 30x T2+ minions
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Yamato Treasure Map, +720}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Sword Box, +4}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Sword Moon}} +1
|-
|56
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Swordsman
|RUSH weakness: 1.780.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Steath}} {{Retext|T3 Bladden Steath, +8|blue}}
|-
|rowspan="2"|57
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Swordsman
|RUSH weakness: 1.850.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Scrolls}} {{Retext|T3 Bladden Scrolls, +8|blue}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|Weapon Rack
|Take the gear! (requires T5 Demon Form)
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Gear RF, +5}}
|-
|58
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Swordsman
|RUSH weakness: 1.880.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Core}} {{Retext|T3 Bladden Core, +8|blue}}
|-
|59
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Swordsman
|RUSH weakness: 1.790.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Steath}} {{Retext|T3 Bladden Steath, +8|blue}}
|-
|60
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Swordsman
|RUSH weakness: 1.840.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Scrolls}} {{Retext|T3 Bladden Scrolls, +8|blue}}
|-
|61
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Swordsman
|RUSH weakness: 1.870.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Core}} {{Retext|T3 Bladden Core, +8|blue}}
|-
|62
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Swordsman
|RUSH weakness: 1.860.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Steath}} {{Retext|T3 Bladden Steath, +8|blue}}
|-
|63
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Sword Jyuzumaru
|RUSH weakness: 1.800.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Scrolls}} {{Retext|T3 Bladden Scrolls, +8|blue}}
|-
|64
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Swordsman
|RUSH weakness: 1.810.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Core}} {{Retext|T3 Bladden Core, +8|blue}}
|-
|65
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Swordsman
|RUSH weakness: 1.830.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Steath}} {{Retext|T3 Bladden Steath, +8|blue}}
|-
|66
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Swordsman
|RUSH weakness: 1.900.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Steath}} {{Retext|T3 Bladden Steath, +8|blue}}
|-
|rowspan="2"|67
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Swordsman
|RUSH weakness: 1.820.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Core}} {{Retext|T3 Bladden Core, +8|blue}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|Chamber Statue
|Take a box! (requires T5 Angel Form)
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Wish Coin, +3|orange}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Sword Moon}} +1
|-
|68
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Ronin
|RUSH weakness: 1.910.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Steath}} {{Retext|T3 Bladden Steath, +8|blue}}
|-
|69
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Ronin
|RUSH weakness: 1.920.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Scrolls}} {{Retext|T3 Bladden Scrolls, +8|blue}}
|-
|rowspan="2"|70
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Miner
|RUSH weakness: 1.940.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Core}} {{Retext|T3 Bladden Core, +8|blue}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|Mine Pit
|Mining duration: 11h 25min 42sec; requirement: 30x T2+ minions
|{{RewardIconWithText|Engineering Printing Supply, +60}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Sword Box, +4}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Incense, +1|orange}}
|-
|71
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Ronin
|RUSH weakness: 1.950.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Core}} {{Retext|T3 Bladden Core, +8|blue}}
|-
|rowspan="3"|72
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Miner
|RUSH weakness: 1.960.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Steath}} {{Retext|T3 Bladden Steath, +8|blue}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|Kagura Pagoda
|Enter the pagoda! (Unseal all 4 Sealed Stones)
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|Kagura Pagoda
|Complete 6 challenges
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Evolution Chest, +300}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Grand Military Seal|green}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Sword Moon}} +1
|-
|73
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Ronin
|RUSH weakness: 1.930.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Scrolls}} {{Retext|T3 Bladden Scrolls, +9|blue}}
|-
|rowspan="2"|74
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Musket Cagutsuchi
|RUSH weakness: 1.980.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Core}} {{Retext|T3 Bladden Core, +9|blue}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|Musket Cagutsuchi
|ATK: 33.046, DEF: 21.640, HP: 576.578, AFFCT: 52793<br>Special stats: HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
|{{RewardIconWithText|Sword Moon}} +1
|-
|75
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Ronin
|RUSH weakness: 1.970.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Steath}} {{Retext|T3 Bladden Steath, +8|blue}}
|-
|rowspan="2"|77
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Samurai
|RUSH weakness: 2.020.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Scrolls}} {{Retext|T4 Bladden Scrolls, +6|purple}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|Fencer Sasaki
|ATK: 34.558, DEF: 22.630, HP: 606.749, AFFCT: 54.289<br>Special stats: HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
|{{RewardIcon|8h Soul Red}}{{Retext|Soul of Samurai Kojiro|red}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Soul Chest, +100}}
|-
|rowspan="2"|78
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Miner
|RUSH weakness: 2.010.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Core}} {{Retext|T4 Bladden Core, +5|purple}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|Mine Pit
|Mining duration: 15h 14min 18sec; requirement: 30x T2+ minions
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Yamato Treasure Map, +960}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Wish Coin, +8|orange}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Sword Box, +6}}
|-
|79
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Samurai
|RUSH weakness: 2.000.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Core}} {{Retext|T4 Bladden Core, +6|purple}}
|-
|80
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Samurai
|RUSH weakness: 2.040.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Steath}} {{Retext|T4 Bladden Steath, +7|purple}}
|-
|rowspan="2"|81
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Samurai
|RUSH weakness: 2.050.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Scrolls}} {{Retext|T4 Bladden Scrolls, +6|purple}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|Swordman Musashi's Tomb
|Display {{RewardIconWithLink|NitenIchi Ryu|green}}
|{{RewardIconWithText|Ancient Coin, +50}}<br>{{RewardIcon|8h Soul Yellow}}{{Retext|Soul of Samurai Musashi|yellow}}
|-
|rowspan="2"|82
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Samurai
|RUSH weakness: 2.030.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Core}} {{Retext|T4 Bladden Core, +7|purple}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|Ninja Galphord's Tomb
|Release it! (Use 1 Incense to release them)
|{{RewardIcon|8h Soul Yellow}}{{Retext|Soul of LuLu|yellow}}<br>{{RewardIcon|8h Soul Yellow}}{{Retext|Soul of Ninja Galphord}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Falcon Specimen|green}}
|-
|rowspan="3"|83
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Traveler 6147
|RUSH weakness: 2.070.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Steath}} {{Retext|T4 Bladden Steath, +6|purple}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|Traveler 6147
|ATK: 39.139, DEF: 25.630, HP: 767.708, AFFCT: 58.864<br>Special stats: HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%!
|{{RewardIcon|8h Soul Red}}{{Retext|Soul of Traveler 1647|red}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +10k}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Traveler 6147's Rocket
|Demolish the rocket!
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Super Memetic Chest, +20}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Refine Speedup, +12h}}
|-
|rowspan="2"|84
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Samurai
|RUSH weakness: 2.060.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Scrolls}} {{Retext|T4 Bladden Scrolls, +6|purple}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|Fencer Kamiizumi's Tomb
|Bow to Worship!
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Grandmaster Scroll, +40|orange}}<br>{{RewardIcon|8h Soul Yellow}}{{Retext|Soul of Fencer Kamiizumi|yellow}}
|-
|rowspan="2"|85
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Blade Muramasa
|RUSH weakness: 2.090.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Steath}} {{Retext|T4 Bladden Steath, +6|purple}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|General Oda's Tomb
|Take the gift!
|{{RewardIconWithText|Sword Moon}} +1
|-
|rowspan="2"|86
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Bladden
|RUSH weakness: 2.100.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Core}} {{Retext|T4 Bladden Core, +7|purple}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|Bladden
|ATK: 42.000, DEF: 28.000, HP: 4.800.000, AFFCT: 63.000<br>Special stats: CRIT +100%, HIT +90, Paralysis RES +90%
|{{RewardIconWithText|Sword Moon}} +1<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Bladden's Head|green}}
|-
|rowspan="2"|87
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Sword Mogenjin
|RUSH weakness: 2.080.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Scrolls}} {{Retext|T4 Bladden Scrolls, +7|purple}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|Killer Shishio's Tomb
|ATK: 37.581, DEF: 24.610, HP: 679.576, AFFCT: 57.354<br>Special stats: HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
|{{RewardIconWithText|Sword Moon}} +1
|-
|}
-->

__forcetoc__

= Legend =
{|class=wikitable
!Type
!Color Assignment
|-
|Event
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|
|-
|Snail Battle
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|
|-
|Reward
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|
|-
|Mine Pit
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|
|}

= Tiles =
{| class="wikitable"
!Tile
!Name (first encounter)
!Troop RUSH required Power
!Reward (first encounter)
!Name (second encounter)
!Reward (second encounter)
!Notes
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|1
|Ronin
|1,500,000
|T1 Bladden Sheath +5
|Sign
|{{RewardIconWithText|Wood}} +500
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|2
|Ronin
|1,510,000
|T1 Bladden Scrolls +5
|Daruma Tumbler
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Lottery Ticket, +3|orange}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Engineering Printing Supply}} +50
|{{RewardIconWithText|Password Note}} is 4423
|-
|3
|Ronin
|1,510,000
|T1 Bladden Core +5
|
|
|
|-
|4
|Ronin
|1,500,000
|T1 Bladden Sheath +5
|
|
|
|-
|5
|Ronin
|1,520,000
|T1 Bladden Scrolls +5
|
|
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|6
|Ronin
|1,520,000
|T1 Bladden Core +5
|Rshitigarbha Statue
|{{RewardIconWithText|Offering Speedup}} +12h
|Requires 100 {{RewardIcon|Oden}}[[Consumables#Food|Oden]] (food), acquired from exploring [[Yamato]] (be careful not to auto-replenish and use it up)
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|7
|Laborer
|1,530,000
|T1 Bladden Core +5
|Mine Pit
|{{RewardIconWithText|Sword Box}} +2<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Ancient Coin}} +240<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Yamato Treasure Map}} +480
|
|-
|8
|Ronin
|1,530,000
|T1 Bladden Sheath +5
|
|
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|9
|Ronin
|1,540,000
|T1 Bladden Scrolls +5
|Hermit Seijuro's Tomb
|{{RewardIconWithText|Sword Moon}} +1
|RUSH requires AFFCT 41,000
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|10
|Sword Kiku
|1,540,000
|T1 Bladden Core +5
|Broken Sword
|
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Gear Chest}} +100
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|11
|Samurai
|1,550,000
|T1 Bladden Sheath +5
|Sign
|{{RewardIconWithText|Wood}}+500
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|12
|Samurai
|1,560,000
|T1 Bladden Scrolls +5
|Sealed Stone
|{{RewardIconWithText|Zombie Cell, +3k}}
|Display relic FAME > 81
|-
|13
|Samurai
|1,550,000
|T1 Bladden Core +5
|
|
|
|-
|14
|Samurai
|1,580,000
|T1 Bladden Sheath +5
|
|
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|15
|Samurai
|1,580,000
|T1 Bladden Scrolls +5
|Sealed Stone
|{{RewardIconWithText|Angel Cell, +3k}}
|Display relic FTH > 85
|-
|16
|Samurai
|1,560,000
|T1 Bladden Core +5
|
|
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|17
|Laborer
|1,590,000
|T1 Bladden Core +5
|Mine Pit
|{{RewardIconWithText|Sword Box}} +2<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Tool Chest}} +480<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Yamato Treasure Map}} +480
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|18
|Samurai
|1,570,000
|T1 Bladden Sheath +5
|Sealed Stone
|{{RewardIconWithText|Demon Cell, +3k}}
|Display relic ART > 90
|-
|19
|Samurai
|1,570,000
|T1 Bladden Scrolls +5
|
|
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|20
|Samurai
|1,600,000
|T1 Bladden Scrolls +5
|Sealed Stone
|{{RewardIconWithText|Mutant Cell, +3k}}
|Display relic CIV > 88
|-
|21
|Samurai
|1,590,000
|T1 Bladden Sheath +5
|
|
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|22
|Sword Dojigiri
|1,600,000
|T1 Bladden Core +5
|Sword Dojigiri
||{{RewardIconWithLink|Demon Chest|orange}} +50<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Sword Moon}} +1<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Lycoris|green}}
|AFFCT 43,357
|-
|23
|Samurai
|1,610,000
|T1 Bladden Core +5
|Sign
|{{RewardIconWithText|Ancient Wood|orange}} +3 (Wood +2,000 each)
|
|-
|24
|Swordsman
|1,610,000
|T2 Bladden Sheath +8
|
|
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|25
|Laborer
|1,620,000
|T2 Bladden Core +8
|Mine Pit
|{{RewardIconWithText|Sword Box}} +3<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Yamato Treasure Map}} +600<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Lottery Ticket, +10|orange}}
|
|-
|26
|Swordsman
|1,640,000
|T2 Bladden Scrolls +8
|
|
|
|-
|27
|Swordsman
|1,620,000
|T2 Bladden Core +8
|
|
|
|-
|28
|Swordsman
|1,630,000
|T2 Bladden Sheath +8
|
|
|
|-
|29
|Swordsman
|1,630,000
|T2 Bladden Scrolls +8
|
|
|
|-
|30
|Swordsman
|1,640,000
|T2 Bladden Core +8
|Snowfield Onsen
|{{RewardIconWithText|Sword Moon}} +1
|Requires avatar: GM (acquired from [[Altar#One_time_wishes|Discount Dragon]] wish: "I want to meet the GM")
|-
|31
|Swordsman
|1,650,000
|T2 Bladden Sheath +8
|
|
|
|-
|32
|Mom
|1,650,000
|T2 Bladden Scrolls +8
|Shop
|{{RewardIconWithText|Sword Moon}} +1<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Toner}}+120<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Yamato Treasure Map}} +100<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Glue}} +30<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Clone Speedup, +3h}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Wish Coin|orange}} +1
|Items are purchasable for b-tads; one-time per item
|-
|33
|Swordsman
|1,660,000
|T2 Bladden Core +8
|
|
|
|-
|34
|Sword Mikazuki
|1,660,000
|T2 Bladden Sheath +8
|
|
|
|-
|35
|Swordsman
|1,670,000
|T2 Bladden Scrolls +8
|
|
|
|-
|36
|Swordsman
|1,670,000
|T2 Bladden Core +8
|
|
|
|-
|37
|Swordsman
|1,680,000
|T2 Bladden Sheath +8
|
|
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|38
|Sword Nagamitsu
|1,700,000
|T2 Bladden Core +8
|Duel
|{{RewardIconWithText|Sword Moon}} +1
|AFFCT 46,286
|-
|39
|Ronin
|1,710,000
|T2 Bladden Sheath +8
|
|
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|40
|Swordsman
|1,690,000
|T2 Bladden Scrolls +8
|Bamboo Forest
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Shinkage Ryu Shift|green}}
|Requires 2.8M Power
|-
|41
|Ronin
|1,690,000
|T2 Bladden Core +8
|
|
|
|-
|42
|Ronin
|1,710,000
|T2 Bladden Sheath +8
|
|
|
|-
|43
|Ronin
|1,680,000
|T2 Bladden Scrolls +8
|
|
|
|-
|44
|Samurai
|1,710,000
|T2 Bladden Scrolls +8
|
|
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|45
|Samurai
|1,730,000
|T2 Bladden Core +8
|Information on the Screen
|{{RewardIconWithText|Password Note}} (4423)<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Lottery Ticket, +3|orange}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|B-tad, +4423}}
|
|-
|46
|Samurai
|1,730,000
|T2 Bladden Sheath +8
|
|
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|47
|Samurai
|1,720,000
|T2 Bladden Scrolls +9
|Nogaku Hall
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Demon Chest|orange}} +50<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Sword Moon}} +1
|Display 5-star relic: [[Pine Trees Screen]]
|-
|48
|Samurai
|1,720,000
|T2 Bladden Core +8
|
|
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|49
|Laborer
|1,740,000
|T2 Bladden Sheath +8
|Mine Pit
|{{RewardIconWithText|Sword Box}} +3<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Yamato Treasure Map}} +600<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Evolution Chest}} +600
|
|-
|50
|Sword Onimaru
|1,770,000
|T2 Bladden Sheath +8
|
|
|
|-
|51
|Samurai
|1,760,000
|T2 Bladden Scrolls +8
|
|
|
|-
|52
|Samurai
|1,750,000
|T2 Bladden Core +8
|
|
|
|-
|53
|Samurai
|1,750,000
|T2 Bladden Sheath +8
|
|
|
|-
|54
|Samurai
|1,740,000
|T2 Bladden Scrolls +8
|
|
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|55
|Laborer
|1,890,000
|T3 Bladden Scrolls +8
|Mine Pit
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Yamato Treasure Map}} +720<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Sword Box}} +4<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Sword Moon}} +1
|
|-
|56
|Swordsman
|1,780,000
|T3 Bladden Sheath +8
|
|
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|57
|Swordsman
|1,850,000
|T3 Bladden Scrolls +8
|Weapon Rack
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Gear RF|orange}} +5
|Requires T5 [[Demon Form]]
|-
|58
|Swordsman
|1,870,000
|T3 Bladden Core +8
|
|
|
|-
|59
|Swordsman
|1,790,000
|T3 Bladden Sheath +8
|
|
|
|-
|60
|Swordsman
|1,840,000
|T3 Bladden Scrolls +8
|
|
|
|-
|61
|Swordsman
|1,870,000
|T3 Bladden Core +8
|
|
|
|-
|62
|Swordsman
|1,860,000
|T3 Bladden Sheath +8
|
|
|
|-
|63
|Sword Jyuzumaru
|1,800,000
|T3 Bladden Scrolls +8
|
|
|
|-
|64
|Swordsman
|1,810,000
|T3 Bladden Core +8
|
|
|
|-
|65
|Swordsman
|1,830,000
|T3 Bladden Sheath +8
|
|
|
|-
|66
|Swordsman
|1,900,000
|T3 Bladden Scrolls +8
|
|
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|67
|Swordsman
|1,820,000
|T3 Bladden Core +8
|Chamber Statue
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Wish Coin|orange}} +3<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Sword Moon}} +1
|Requires T5 [[Angel Form]]
|-
|68
|Ronin
|1,910,000
|T3 Bladden Sheath +8
|
|
|
|-
|69
|Ronin
|1,920,000
|T3 Bladden Scrolls +8
|
|
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|70
|Laborer
|1,940,000
|T3 Bladden Core +8
|Mine Pit
|{{RewardIconWithText|Engineering Printing Supply}} +60<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Sword Box}} +4<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Incense|orange}} +1
|
|-
|71
|Ronin
|1,950,000
|T3 Bladden Core +8
|
|
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|72
|Ronin
|1,960,000
|T3 Bladden Sheath +8
|Kagura Pagoda
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Grand Military Seal|green}} after completing all 6 floors
|Requires unsealing 4/4 Sealed Stones
|-
|73
|Ronin
|1,930,000
|T3 Bladden Scrolls +8
|
|
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|74
|Musket Cagutsuchi
|1,980,000
|T3 Bladden Core +8
|Duel
|{{RewardIconWithText|Sword Moon}} +1
|AFFCT 52,793
|-
|75
|Ronin
|1,970,000
|T3 Bladden Sheath +8
|
|
|
|-
|76
|Samurai
|1,990,000
|T4 Bladden Sheath +6
|
|
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|77
|Samurai
|2,020,000
|T4 Bladden Scrolls +6
|Fencer Sasaki
|
|AFFCT 54,289
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|78
|Laborer
|2,010,000
|T4 Bladden Core +5
|Mine Pit
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Yamato Treasure Map}} +960<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Sword Box}} +6<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Wish Coin|orange}} +8
|
|-
|79
|Samurai
|2,000,000
|T4 Bladden Core +6
|
|
|
|-
|80
|Samurai
|2,040,000
|T4 Bladden Sheath +7
|
|
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|81
|Samurai
|2,050,000
|T4 Bladden Scrolls +6
|Swordsman Musashi's Tomb
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Ancient Coin}} +50<br>Soul of Samurai Musashi (8h)
|Display relic [[Niten Ichi Ryu]]
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|82
|Samurai
|2,030,000
|T4 Bladden Core +7
|Ninja Galphord
|Soul of LuLu (8h)<br>Soul of Ninja Galphord (8h)<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Falcon Specimen|green}}
|Requires 1 {{RewardIconWithLink|Incense|orange}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|83
|Traveler 6147
|2,070,000
|T4 Bladden Sheath +6
|Traveler 6147
|Soul of Traveler 6147 (8h)<br>{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}} +10k
|AFFCT 58,864
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|84
|Samurai
|2,060,000
|T4 Bladden Scrolls +6
|Fencer Kamiizumi's Tomb
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Grandmaster Scroll|orange}} +40<br>Soul of Fencer Kamiizumi (8h)
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|85
|Blade Muramasa
|2,090,000
|T4 Bladden Sheath +6
|General Oda
|{{RewardIconWithText|Sword Moon}} +1
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|87
|Sword Mogenjin
|2,080,000
|T4 Bladden Scrolls +7
|Killer Shishio
|{{RewardIconWithText|Sword Moon}} +1
|AFFCT 57,354
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|86
|Bladden
|2,100,000
|T4 Bladden Core +7
|Bladden's Broken Helmet
|{{RewardIconWithText|Sword Moon}} +1<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Bladden's Head|green}}
|AFFCT 63,000
|}

= Moon Shop =
{|class="wikitable"
!Item
!Cost
|-
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Sheath}}{{Retext|T3 Minerva Power|blue}} +50
|{{RewardIcon|Sword Moon}}
|-
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Scrolls}}{{Retext|T3 Minerva Wings|blue}} +50
|{{RewardIcon|Sword Moon}}
|-
|{{RewardIcon|Bladden Core}}{{Retext|T3 Minerva Core|blue}} +50
|{{RewardIcon|Sword Moon}}
|-
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Toner, +120}}
|{{RewardIcon|Sword Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Sword Moon}}
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +150k}}
|{{RewardIcon|Sword Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Sword Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Sword Moon}}
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Refine Speedup, +2d}}
|{{RewardIcon|Sword Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Sword Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Sword Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Sword Moon}}
|-
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Golden Pickaxe, +8|orange}}
|{{RewardIcon|Sword Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Sword Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Sword Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Sword Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Sword Moon}}
|-
|{{RewardIcon|Crystal of Will}}{{Gearlink|orange|Material|Crystal of Will}}
|{{RewardIcon|Sword Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Sword Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Sword Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Sword Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Sword Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Sword Moon}}
|-
|After Domain is 100%<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Yamato Nebula Pack|orange}} ({{RewardIconWithLink|Quantum Gel, +1k}} and {{RewardIconWithLink|Singularity Crystal, +1|orange}})
|{{RewardIcon|Sword Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Sword Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Sword Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Sword Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Sword Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Sword Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Sword Moon}}
|}

[[Category:Yamato Domain]]
